center.name: 俄勒冈州
center.summary: 俄勒冈州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联8种鸟类，包括大滨鹬、艾氏煌蜂鸟、黑菲比霸鶲等8种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The California towhee (Melozone crissalis) is a bird of the family Passerellidae, native to the coastal regions of western Oregon and California in the United States and Baja California and Baja California Sur in Mexico

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Woodhouse's scrub jay (Aphelocoma woodhouseii) is a species of scrub jay native to western North America, ranging from southeastern Oregon and southern Idaho to central Mexico

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The range spans from southeastern and central China to northern Indochina. It is found in the Yangtze valley and the southeastern Jiangxi Province in China. The crested myna has also been recorded in Burma, Taiwan and Hainan. thumb|227x227px|A crested myna wades in water|alt=|left As a popular cage bird, it is often transported outside of its normal range and, on occasion, can be accidentally released and introduced in a new area. For example, in the late 1800s, it was introduced to Vancouver, British Columbia. It was able to proliferate and its population grew to around 20,000 to 30,000 individuals. It could be found anywhere from the south of the province to Washington and Oregon. By the mid-20th century, the numbers began declining, and the bird is now extirpated in North America. Other examples of the crested myna's introduction can be seen in Portugal.{{cite journal |author=Saavedra, S

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The species is also recorded in summer in low numbers in western Alaska, United States in most years, and in winter in small numbers west to Pakistan, Oman, and the United Arab Emirates. It has occurred as a vagrant in Great Britain, Morocco, New Zealand, British Columbia in Canada, and in the lower 48 states of the USA in Oregon, West Virginia, and Maine

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: thumb|Adult female tending a nest Allen's hummingbirds are commonly found in locations such as the brushy woods, gardens, and meadows of coastal California from Santa Barbara north, and southern coastal Oregon

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Native to Western North America, the species ranges from central Oregon to northern Baja California, and eastward as far as western Oklahoma, though wanderers are often sighted beyond this range

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The yellow-breasted chat (Icteria virens) is a large songbird in the New World blackbirds family Icteridae that is found in North and Central America

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: In Oregon it is found in river valleys on the Pacific coast, and in California on the western side of Coast Ranges
